full_text: Tanzim Hasan Sakib to Tristan Stubbs, Caught by Shakib!! This is going downhill very quickly for South Africa now as they've lost a fourth in the powerplay. Once more it's the tacky nature of the surface that's to blame here. A back of a length delivery outside off, Tristan Stubbs stood tall and just pushed it towards cover but was through his shot a fraction too early because it stopped on him, it went low to Shakib at cover and he did really well to dive forward and hold on to this. It's been all about the bowlers here in New York and there's nothing different today.

full_text: Maharaj to Taskin Ahmed, 1 run, What a thriller. Once again the ball slips out of Maharaj's hand and he serves a high full toss wide of off. Taskin Ahmed can only slash it into the covers. full_text: Maharaj to Mahmudullah, Caught by Markram!! Mahmudullah doesn't want to leave. He stands stunned after seeing the South African skipper pull off an excellent boundary-flirting catch. A low full toss from Maharaj and Mahmudullah tonked it really hard straight down the ground. Markram shows excellent awareness as he runs back to his left to take a high-pressure catch well above his head. Had he missed it, that would have been game over.
